# Entropy Worked Example

A set of 100 campaign captions uses these templates:

- Template A: 70
- Template B: 20
- Template C: 10

Probabilities:

- `p_A = 0.7`
- `p_B = 0.2`
- `p_C = 0.1`

Entropy:

`H = -Σ p_i log(p_i)`

`H = -(.7 log .7 + .2 log .2 + .1 log .1)`

Low entropy means one or two templates dominate.

## Use

Low caption entropy plus tight timing plus repeated accounts strengthens evidence of coordination.

Low entropy alone may simply mean a brand provided official wording.
